7.reason: Loop condition excludes the last character, so the final character after the last expansion (e.g., 'F' in "B-F") is never printed.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Loop condition excludes the last character, so the final character after the last expansion (e.g., 'F' in "B-F") is never printed.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Loop condition should be toa < strlen(a) to include the last character (e.g., 'F' in "a-uB-F")
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition `toa < strlen(a) - 1` causes the last character of the string to be skipped. When an expansion range ends at the last character (e.g., 'F' in 'B-F'), the loop terminates before it can be printed. Changing it to `toa < strlen(a)` ensures all characters are processed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop condition stops one character early, so last character is never printed if it's not part of a '-' pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Loop condition stops one character early, so the last character is never printed if it's not part of a '-' expansion.]

13.reason: Expansion condition should use strict inequality '<' instead of '<=' to match problem requirement (only expand when character after '-' is greater than the one before)

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Expansion condition should use strict inequality '<' instead of '<=' to match problem requirement (only expand when character after '-' is greater than the one before)
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect range checks: e.g., for digits, it checks a[toa-1]>=48 and a[toa+1]<=57 but doesn't ensure both are in the same category; also uses <= instead of < for expansion condition]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect range checks: e.g., (a[toa-1]>=48 && a[toa+1]<=57) does not ensure both are digits; should check both ends are in same category. Also uses <= instead of < for expansion condition, which violates requirement that second char must be greater.]
